_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: bmagyar
data.message:
Migrate to ROS2 (#2)

Co-authored-by: Victor Lopez <victor.lopez@pal-robotics.com>
Co-authored-by: Noel Jimenez <noel.jimenez@pal-robotics.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,20 +1,14 @@
-cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
 project(twist_mux_msgs)
 
-find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS message_generation actionlib actionlib_msgs)
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+find_package(rosidl_default_generators REQUIRED)
 
-include_directories(include)
+rosidl_generate_interfaces(${PROJECT_NAME}
+  "action/JoyPriority.action"
+  "action/JoyTurbo.action"
+  ADD_LINTER_TESTS
+)
 
-add_action_files(
-  DIRECTORY action
-  FILES
-    JoyPriority.action
-    JoyTurbo.action)
-
-generate_messages(DEPENDENCIES actionlib_msgs)
-
-catkin_package(CATKIN_DEPENDS message_runtime actionlib_msgs)
-
-install(DIRECTORY include/${PROJECT_NAME}/
-  DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_INCLUDE_DESTINATION}
-  FILES_MATCHING PATTERN "*.h")
+ament_export_dependencies(rosidl_default_runtime)
+ament_package()

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 <?xml version="1.0"?>
-<package>
+<package format="3">
   <name>twist_mux_msgs</name>
   <version>2.1.0</version>
   <description>The twist_mux msgs and actions package</description>
@@ -11,13 +11,17 @@
 
   <license>CC BY-NC-SA 4.0</license>
 
-  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+  <buildtool_depend>rosidl_default_generators</buildtool_depend>
 
-  <build_depend>message_generation</build_depend>
-  <build_depend>actionlib</build_depend>
-  <build_depend>actionlib_msgs</build_depend>
+  <depend>action_msgs</depend>
 
-  <run_depend>message_runtime</run_depend>
-  <run_depend>actionlib</run_depend>
-  <run_depend>actionlib_msgs</run_depend>
+  <exec_depend>rosidl_default_runtime</exec_depend>
+
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>
+
+  <member_of_group>rosidl_interface_packages</member_of_group>
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
 </package>

@@ -4,8 +4,9 @@
   <version>0.0.1</version>
   <description>The twist_mux msgs and actions package</description>
 
-  <maintainer email="enrique.fernandez@pal-robotics.com">Enrique Fernandez</maintainer>
-  <author email="enrique.fernandez@pal-robotics.com">Enrique Fernandez</author>
+  <maintainer email="efernandez@clearpathrobotics.com">Enrique Fernandez</maintainer>
+
+  <author email="efernandez@clearpathrobotics.com">Enrique Fernandez</author>
   <author email="siegfried.gevatter@pal-robotics.com">Siegfried-A. Gevatter Pujals</author>
 
   <license>CC BY-NC-SA 4.0</license>

data.author: Enrique Fernández Perdomo
data.message:
Update README.md

Add documentation link and build status.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(twist_mux_msgs)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS message_generation actionlib actionlib_msgs)
+
+include_directories(include)
+
+add_action_files(
+  DIRECTORY action
+  FILES
+    JoyPriority.action
+    JoyTurbo.action)
+
+generate_messages(DEPENDENCIES actionlib_msgs)
+
+catkin_package(CATKIN_DEPENDS message_runtime actionlib_msgs)
+
+install(DIRECTORY include/${PROJECT_NAME}/
+  DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_INCLUDE_DESTINATION}
+  FILES_MATCHING PATTERN "*.h")

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package>
+  <name>twist_mux_msgs</name>
+  <version>0.0.0</version>
+  <description>The twist_mux msgs and actions package</description>
+
+  <maintainer email="enrique.fernandez@pal-robotics.com">Enrique Fernandez</maintainer>
+  <author email="enrique.fernandez@pal-robotics.com">Enrique Fernandez</author>
+  <author email="siegfried.gevatter@pal-robotics.com">Siegfried-A. Gevatter Pujals</author>
+
+  <license>CC BY-NC-SA 4.0</license>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <build_depend>message_generation</build_depend>
+  <build_depend>actionlib</build_depend>
+  <build_depend>actionlib_msgs</build_depend>
+
+  <run_depend>message_runtime</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>actionlib</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>actionlib_msgs</run_depend>
+</package>
